## Why It Works

This is an X vs. Y post. I take something that people resent (the system) and compare its shortcomings to something people want (a better life). The format is clean, and the line length brings the eyes easily down the page.

## Template

What the [COMMON APPROACH] teaches people:
- [TYPICAL STEP 1]
- [TYPICAL STEP 2]
- [TYPICAL STEP 3]
- [TYPICAL STEP 4]
A better approach:
- [IMPROVED STEP 1]
- [IMPROVED STEP 2]
- [IMPROVED STEP 3]
- [IMPROVED STEP 4]
- [IMPROVED STEP 5]
There are [NUMBER] ways to do this that I think work best.
(and can generate [SPECIFIC OUTCOME] over time)
Start here: [YOUR LINK]

## Example

What the typical gym routine teaches people:
- Go to the gym sporadically
- Do random exercises without a plan
- Focus on looking good in the mirror
- Repeat
A better approach:
- Commit to a consistent workout schedule
- Use that time to build strength and endurance
- Use that strength to improve overall fitness
- Use that fitness to boost energy and confidence
- Use that energy to maintain a healthier lifestyle
There are 2 ways to do this that I think work best.
(and can transform your body and mind in just 12 weeks)
Start here: [YOUR LINK]
